BeneficiaryParty.Name: Innovative AIX
BeneficiaryParty.Address: Suite 180, 1st Floor, Nemea Building, 6 Isocrates Street, 2360 Strovolos, Cyprus

Transaction.SuspiciousActivity: Attempted withdrawal blocked by Innovative AIX. Customer reports difficulty accessing funds and conflicting information from the company.
Transaction.Notes: Customer previously made several large transfers to Innovative AIX. Company’s communication is evasive and unresponsive.
